title: ricinocarpus adenotrichus
intro: Ricinocarpus adenotrichus is a plant species commonly known as 'Ghrita Shringi' in Ayurveda, belonging to the family Sapindaceae, characterized by its small yellow flowers and edible fruits. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus adenotrichus include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and powder forms, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its therapeutic properties.
